creator: wblock@FreeBSD.org
text:
The PDF version of the Porter's Handbook shows <revnumber> elements with the tags.  Examples can be seen in the USES and __FreeBSD_version appendices at the end of the PDF.
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.pdf.bz2

See page 239 for an example, <revnumber> 263509 is shown in red but the tags are visible.
